overview: A professional dark-themed engineering portfolio for Shahid Moosa, a Distributed Systems Engineer specializing in cloud databases and high-scale query optimization. Features a live terminal component, technical blog articles, work history, engineering philosophy, and contact section.
features: Live Terminal interactive component with distributed systems commands
Technical blog with sample articles on CAP theorem, sharding, and consistency models
Dark tech aesthetic with ambient glow effects
SEO-optimized meta tags and Open Graph data
